parent_name: RET自助表填写与反馈修正

children.name: Socratic Debate on Irrational Beliefs
children.description: Use guided questioning to challenge absolutist and overgeneralized beliefs (e.g., 'must', 'should', 'always', 'never'), helping client detect logical flaws, empirical inconsistencies, and functional consequences of their beliefs.
children.applicable_when: Use guided questioning to challenge absolutist and overgeneralized beliefs (e.g., 'must', 'should', 'always', 'never'), helping client detect logical flaws, empirical inconsistencies, and functional consequences of their beliefs.
selector_terms: client has identified a specific irrational belief in RET table
client expresses openness to examining belief validity
therapist observes emotional activation linked to belief
